mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.enterprise_id, a.status, a.opinion, a.auditor_id, a.create_time, u.real_name AS auditorName, CASE a.status WHEN 0 THEN '提交入驻申请' WHEN 1 THEN '审核通过：准予入驻' WHEN 2 THEN '审核驳回：退回修改' WHEN 3 THEN '办理迁出：流程结束' ELSE '变更状态' END AS auditAction FROM biz_enterprise_audit a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.auditor_id = u.id WHERE a.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
